coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a mind in constant forward motion, fixated on opportunity and external validation ("great pitch to close University Social Project," "best seller, charismatic") but profoundly disconnected from the internal discipline required to sustain that output, evidenced by the glaring absence of evening reflection and the consistent breakdown in foundational habits like Sleep and Training. The root cause is a catastrophic lack of self-stewardship, where the pursuit of external achievement has utterly eclipsed the non-negotiable spiritual and physical inputs that fuel elite performance, thereby creating an unsustainable trajectory built on ambition rather than robust capacity. Today, before *any* other input, execute your PM Review, objectively assessing where you fell short and precisely how you will adjust tomorrow.
